sales.description:
Ancients
MYSIA. Cyzicus. Ca. 550-450 BC. EL stater (19mm, 16.09 gm). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Head of Athena left, wearing crested Attic helmet; tunny upward behind / Quadripartite mill sail incuse square. Greenwell 27. Von Fritze 63. A fantastic example of this rare type, featuring soft dove toning that backlights the devices. Pleasant rose toning in the recesses on the reverse.  www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
